column1: RECON — V1 MVP Brief (Claude Code Ready)

column2: RECON — Route Environment & Condition Observation for Navigation

User pastes a route link (Strava, MapMyRide/MapMyFitness) or uploads a route file (GPX/TCX/FIT). RECON normalizes the route geometry + elevation, segments it, enriches it from data sources, and returns: (1) a route dossier, (2) an interactive map with overlays, (3) a plain-language ride planning summary.
Deliver a high-signal route dossier + map overlays using sources we can access reliably without partner deals, and design the architecture so richer sources can be swapped in for V2.

• Universal parcel-accurate private property lines
• Guaranteed business hours freshness everywhere
• Universal municipal closure coverage
• Social photo harvesting from third-party sites without explicit supported APIs / permissions

• Surface breakdown (best-effort)
• Public lands / land manager overlay (US-focused)
• Weather-by-segment (US: NWS; Global fallback: Open-Meteo in dev)
• Water + resupply + bike shop + emergency POIs
• Supply gaps (distance between critical points)
• Trail conditions (optional: Trailforks if approved)
• Visual recon imagery (optional: Mapillary; V2: prefer Strava imagery where supported)
